notes: Bundle staged after the public dedicated server updated to Steam build 23487010 / Brickadia CL13530.
The bundle structure and manifest hashes pass scripts/validate-bundle.mjs for CL13530.
The initial files are seeded from the prior CL12960 compatibility bundle and must be revalidated against CL13530 before object-dependent Windows control can be enabled.
The patched Brickadia UE4SS runtime downgrades the unresolved GUObjectHashTables stage-2 scan to a degraded startup signal instead of a fatal error.
The live UE4SS log resolves GNatives, GUObjectArray, FName::ToString, and CallFunctionByNameWithArguments through Lua scripts on CL13530.
UE4SS reaches ScanGame, installs post-init hooks, and starts OmeggaBridge on CL13530.
The CL13530 baseline proof ladder reaches InitGameState from Lua.
FindFirstOf and StaticFindObject proof sessions return UObject wrappers in clean CL13530 sessions.
Object-resolution correctness is now proven by the CL13530 baseline proof ladder, but the dumper itself has not been rerun and validated yet.
Omegga remains degraded until the CL13530 chat and world-export canaries are rerun and the dumper gate is intentionally resolved or deferred.

GNatives.method: seeded Lua script during CL13530 validation
